name: The Cleaner
overview: Dragon Brother, once a former underworld boss, now runs a cleaning company that specializes in cleaning up death scenes. Together with his disciple, Da Chuan, they enter various accident sites, witnessing the myriad facets of human life and sorting out their own life entanglements. Everything takes a different turn when Dragon Brother’s daughter suddenly returns to the hometown…

trailers.title: #人生清理員 （影集版）｜ 清理之前，每一次都無法習以為常，每次，都是會痛的｜ #鳳小岳 #宋芸樺  #金士傑 #黃冠智 #蔡嘉茵
